sEn: Self-normalizing neural networks (SNNs) with SELU activations automatically converge to zero mean and unit variance, enabling deep architectures and robust learning.
sZh: 自归一化神经网络（SNN）使用SELU激活函数，自动收敛到零均值和单位方差，从而支持深层架构和鲁棒学习。
absEn: Deep Learning has revolutionized vision via convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and natural language processing via recurrent neural networks (RNNs). However, success stories of Deep Learning with standard feed-forward neural networks (FNNs) are rare. FNNs that perform well are typically shallow and, therefore cannot exploit many levels of abstract representations. We introduce self-normalizing neural networks (SNNs) to enable high-level abstract representations. While batch normalization requires explicit normalization, neuron activations of SNNs automatically converge towards zero mean and unit variance. The activation function of SNNs are "scaled exponential linear units" (SELUs), which induce self-normalizing properties. Using the Banach fixed-point theorem, we prove that activations close to zero mean and unit variance that are propagated through many network layers will converge towards zero mean and unit variance -- even under the presence of noise and perturbations. This convergence property of SNNs allows to (1) train deep networks with many layers, (2) employ strong regularization, and (3) to make learning highly robust. Furthermore, for activations not close to unit variance, we prove an upper and lower bound on the variance, thus, vanishing and exploding gradients are impossible. We compared SNNs on (a) 121 tasks from the UCI machine learning repository, on (b) drug discovery benchmarks, and on (c) astronomy tasks with standard FNNs and other machine learning methods such as random forests and support vector machines. SNNs significantly outperformed all competing FNN methods at 121 UCI tasks, outperformed all competing methods at the Tox21 dataset, and set a new record at an astronomy data set. The winning SNN architectures are often very deep. Implementations are available at: github.com/bioinf-jku/SNNs.
absZh: 深度学习通过卷积神经网络（CNN）和循环神经网络（RNN）在视觉和自然语言处理领域引发了革命。然而，标准前馈神经网络（FNN）在深度学习中的成功案例却很少。表现良好的FNN通常较浅，因此无法利用多层次的抽象表示。我们引入了自归一化神经网络（SNN）以实现高级抽象表示。批归一化需要显式归一化，而SNN的神经元激活会自动收敛到零均值和单位方差。SNN的激活函数是“缩放指数线性单元”（SELU），它具有自归一化特性。利用巴拿赫不动点定理，我们证明了接近零均值和单位方差的激活值在通过多个网络层传播时，即使在噪声和扰动存在的情况下，也会收敛到零均值和单位方差。SNN的这种收敛特性允许（1）训练深层网络，（2）使用强正则化，（3）使学习高度鲁棒。此外，对于不接近单位方差的激活值，我们证明了方差的上界和下界，因此梯度消失和爆炸是不可能的。我们在（a）UCI机器学习库的121个任务、（b）药物发现基准测试和（c）天文学任务上，将SNN与标准FNN以及其他机器学习方法（如随机森林和支持向量机）进行了比较。SNN在121个UCI任务上显著优于所有竞争的FNN方法，在Tox21数据集上优于所有竞争方法，并在一个天文学数据集上创造了新纪录。获胜的SNN架构通常非常深。实现代码可在github.com/bioinf-jku/SNNs获取。

contrib.en: Introduced self-normalizing neural networks (SNNs) with SELU activation that automatically normalize activations to zero mean and unit variance.
contrib.zh: 提出了自归一化神经网络（SNN），使用SELU激活函数自动将激活值归一化为零均值和单位方差。

contrib.en: Proved via Banach fixed-point theorem that activations converge to zero mean and unit variance across layers under noise and perturbations.
contrib.zh: 通过巴拿赫不动点定理证明，在噪声和扰动下，激活值跨层收敛到零均值和单位方差。

contrib.en: Proved upper and lower bounds on variance mapping, preventing vanishing and exploding gradients.
contrib.zh: 证明了方差映射的上下界，防止梯度消失和梯度爆炸。

contrib.en: Proposed alpha dropout, a regularization method tailored for SELU networks to maintain self-normalizing property.
contrib.zh: 提出了alpha dropout，一种专为SELU网络设计的正则化方法，以保持自归一化特性。

contrib.en: Achieved state-of-the-art results on 121 UCI tasks, Tox21 dataset, and an astronomy dataset, often with very deep architectures.
contrib.zh: 在121个UCI任务、Tox21数据集和天文学数据集上取得了最先进的结果，通常使用非常深的架构。

contrib.en: Demonstrated that SNNs significantly outperform other FNNs with batch, layer, weight normalization, and residual networks.
contrib.zh: 证明SNN显著优于使用批归一化、层归一化、权重归一化和残差网络的其他前馈神经网络。

limits.en: Self-normalizing property relies on the central limit theorem assumption, which may not hold for very narrow layers.
limits.zh: 自归一化性质依赖于中心极限定理假设，对于非常窄的层可能不成立。

limits.en: Theoretical guarantees require weight initialization with zero mean and variance 1/n, which may be violated during training.
limits.zh: 理论保证要求权重初始化为零均值和1/n方差，训练中可能被违反。

limits.en: Performance on small datasets (less than 1000 samples) is inferior to random forests and SVMs.
limits.zh: 在小数据集（少于1000个样本）上性能不如随机森林和支持向量机。

limits.en: The proof of contraction mapping uses computer-assisted verification on a grid, which may not cover all possible parameter ranges.
limits.zh: 压缩映射的证明使用了网格上的计算机辅助验证，可能未覆盖所有可能的参数范围。

limits.en: Alpha dropout requires tuning of dropout rate, and optimal rates may vary across tasks.
limits.zh: Alpha dropout需要调整丢弃率，最优率可能因任务而异。

items.en: Deep Learning has revolutionized vision via convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and natural language processing via recurrent neural networks (RNNs). However, success stories of Deep Learning with standard feed-forward neural networks (FNNs) are rare. FNNs that perform well are typically shallow and, therefore cannot exploit many levels of abstract representations. We introduce self-normalizing neural networks (SNNs) to enable high-level abstract representations. While batch normalization requires explicit normalization, neuron activations of SNNs automatically converge towards zero mean and unit variance. The activation function of SNNs are “scaled exponential linear units” (SELUs), which induce self-normalizing properties. Using the Banach fixed-point theorem, we prove that activations close to zero mean and unit variance that are propagated through many network layers will converge towards zero mean and unit variance — even under the presence of noise and perturbations. This convergence property of SNNs allows to (1) train deep networks with many layers, (2) employ strong regularization schemes, and (3) to make learning highly robust. Furthermore, for activations not close to unit variance, we prove an upper and lower bound on the variance, thus, vanishing and exploding gradients are impossible. We compared SNNs on (a) 121 tasks from the UCI machine learning repository, on (b) drug discovery benchmarks, and on (c) astronomy tasks with standard FNNs, and other machine learning methods such as random forests and support vector machines. For FNNs we considered (i) ReLU networks without normalization, (ii) batch normalization, (iii) layer normalization, (iv) weight normalization, (v) highway networks, and (vi) residual networks. SNNs significantly outperformed all competing FNN methods at 121 UCI tasks, outperformed all competing methods at the Tox21 dataset, and set a new record at an astronomy data set. The winning SNN architectures are often very deep. Implementations are available at: github.com/bioinf-jku/SNNs.
items.zh: 深度学习通过卷积神经网络（CNN）革新了视觉领域，并通过循环神经网络（RNN）革新了自然语言处理。然而，使用标准前馈神经网络（FNN）的深度学习成功案例很少。表现良好的FNN通常较浅，因此无法利用多层次的抽象表示。我们引入了自归一化神经网络（SNN）以实现高级抽象表示。虽然批归一化需要显式归一化，但SNN的神经元激活会自动收敛到零均值和单位方差。SNN的激活函数是“缩放指数线性单元”（SELU），它诱导了自归一化属性。利用巴拿赫不动点定理，我们证明接近零均值和单位方差的激活在通过多个网络层传播时，即使在噪声和扰动存在下也会收敛到零均值和单位方差。SNN的这种收敛特性允许（1）训练具有许多层的深度网络，（2）采用强正则化方案，以及（3）使学习高度鲁棒。此外，对于不接近单位方差的激活，我们证明了方差的上界和下界，因此梯度消失和爆炸是不可能的。我们将SNN与标准FNN以及其他机器学习方法（如随机森林和支持向量机）在（a）UCI机器学习库的121个任务、（b）药物发现基准和（c）天文学任务上进行了比较。对于FNN，我们考虑了（i）无归一化的ReLU网络、（ii）批归一化、（iii）层归一化、（iv）权重归一化、（v）高速公路网络和（vi）残差网络。SNN在121个UCI任务上显著优于所有竞争的FNN方法，在Tox21数据集上优于所有竞争方法，并在一个天文学数据集上创造了新纪录。获胜的SNN架构通常非常深。实现代码可在github.com/bioinf-jku/SNNs获取。

items.en: Accepted for publication at NIPS 2017; please cite as: Klambauer, G., Unterthiner, T., Mayr, A., & Hochreiter, S. (2017). Self-Normalizing Neural Networks. In Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NIPS).
items.zh: 已被NIPS 2017接收发表；引用请注明：Klambauer, G., Unterthiner, T., Mayr, A., & Hochreiter, S. (2017). Self-Normalizing Neural Networks. In Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NIPS).

items.en: Deep Learning has set new records at different benchmarks and led to various commercial applications [25, 33]. Recurrent neural networks (RNNs) [18] achieved new levels at speech and natural language processing, for example at the TIMIT benchmark [12] or at language translation [36], and are already employed in mobile devices [31]. RNNs have won handwriting recognition challenges (Chinese and Arabic handwriting) [33, 13, 6] and Kaggle challenges, such as the “Grasp-and Lift EEG” competition. Their counterparts, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) [24] excel at vision and video tasks. CNNs are on par with human dermatologists at the visual detection of skin cancer [9]. The visual processing for self-driving cars is based on CNNs [19], as is the visual input to AlphaGo which has beaten one of the best human GO players [34]. At vision challenges, CNNs are constantly winning, for example at the large ImageNet competition [23, 16], but also almost all Kaggle vision challenges, such as the “Diabetic Retinopathy” and the “Right Whale” challenges [8, 14].
items.zh: 深度学习在不同基准测试中创造了新纪录，并带来了各种商业应用[25, 33]。循环神经网络（RNN）[18]在语音和自然语言处理方面达到了新水平，例如在TIMIT基准[12]或语言翻译[36]中，并已应用于移动设备[31]。RNN赢得了手写识别挑战（中文和阿拉伯文手写）[33, 13, 6]以及Kaggle挑战，例如“Grasp-and Lift EEG”竞赛。它们的对应物，卷积神经网络（CNN）[24]在视觉和视频任务中表现出色。CNN在皮肤癌的视觉检测方面与人类皮肤科医生水平相当[9]。自动驾驶汽车的视觉处理基于CNN[19]，AlphaGo的视觉输入也是如此，它击败了最优秀的人类围棋选手之一[34]。在视觉挑战中，CNN不断获胜，例如在大型ImageNet竞赛[23, 16]中，以及几乎所有Kaggle视觉挑战，如“Diabetic Retinopathy”和“Right Whale”挑战[8, 14]。

items.en: However, looking at Kaggle challenges that are not related to vision or sequential tasks, gradient boosting, random forests, or support vector machines (SVMs) are winning most of the competitions. Deep Learning is notably absent, and for the few cases where FNNs won, they are shallow. For example, the HIGGS challenge, the Merck Molecular Activity challenge, and the Tox21 Data challenge were all won by FNNs with at most four hidden layers. Surprisingly, it is hard to find success stories with FNNs that have many hidden layers, though they would allow for different levels of abstract representations of the input [3].
items.zh: 然而，在非视觉或非序列任务的Kaggle挑战中，梯度提升、随机森林或支持向量机（SVM）赢得了大多数竞赛。深度学习明显缺席，在少数FNN获胜的情况下，它们也是浅层的。例如，HIGGS挑战、Merck分子活性挑战和Tox21数据挑战均由最多四个隐藏层的FNN获胜。令人惊讶的是，很难找到具有许多隐藏层的FNN的成功案例，尽管它们允许输入的不同层次抽象表示[3]。

items.en: To robustly train very deep CNNs, batch normalization evolved into a standard to normalize neuron activations to zero mean and unit variance [20]. Layer normalization [2] also ensures zero mean and unit variance, while weight normalization [32] ensures zero mean and unit variance if in the previous layer the activations have zero mean and unit variance. However, training with normalization techniques is perturbed by stochastic gradient descent (SGD), stochastic regularization (like dropout), and the estimation of the normalization parameters. Both RNNs and CNNs can stabilize learning via weight sharing, therefore they are less prone to these perturbations. In contrast, FNNs trained with normalization techniques suffer from these perturbations and have high variance in the training error (see Figure 1). This high variance hinders learning and slows it down. Furthermore, strong regularization, such as dropout, is not possible as it would further increase the variance which in turn would lead to divergence of the learning process. We believe that this sensitivity to perturbations is the reason that FNNs are less successful than RNNs and CNNs.
items.zh: 为了鲁棒地训练非常深的CNN，批归一化已成为将神经元激活归一化到零均值和单位方差的标准[20]。层归一化[2]也确保零均值和单位方差，而权重归一化[32]确保如果前一层的激活具有零均值和单位方差，则当前层也是如此。然而，使用归一化技术的训练会受到随机梯度下降（SGD）、随机正则化（如dropout）以及归一化参数估计的扰动。RNN和CNN可以通过权重共享稳定学习，因此它们对这些扰动不太敏感。相比之下，使用归一化技术训练的FNN会受到这些扰动的影响，并且训练误差方差很高（见图1）。这种高方差阻碍了学习并减慢了速度。此外，强正则化（如dropout）是不可能的，因为它会进一步增加方差，进而导致学习过程发散。我们认为，这种对扰动的敏感性是FNN不如RNN和CNN成功的原因。

items.en: Self-normalizing neural networks (SNNs) are robust to perturbations and do not have high variance in their training errors (see Figure 1). SNNs push neuron activations to zero mean and unit variance thereby leading to the same effect as batch normalization, which enables to robustly learn many layers. SNNs are based on scaled exponential linear units “SELUs” which induce self-normalizing properties like variance stabilization which in turn avoids exploding and vanishing gradients.
items.zh: 自归一化神经网络（SNN）对扰动具有鲁棒性，并且其训练误差没有高方差（见图1）。SNN将神经元激活推向零均值和单位方差，从而产生与批归一化相同的效果，这使得能够鲁棒地学习许多层。SNN基于缩放指数线性单元“SELU”，它诱导了自归一化属性，如方差稳定，从而避免了梯度爆炸和消失。

items.en: Therefore, we consider activations of a neural network to be normalized, if both their mean and their variance across samples are within predefined intervals. If mean and variance of 𝒙𝒙\bm{x} are already within these intervals, then also mean and variance of 𝒚𝒚\bm{y} remain in these intervals, i.e., the normalization is transitive across layers. Within these intervals, the mean and variance both converge to a fixed point if the mapping g𝑔g is applied iteratively.
items.zh: 因此，如果神经网络的激活在样本上的均值和方差都在预定义区间内，我们认为这些激活是归一化的。如果x的均值和方差已经在这个区间内，那么y的均值和方差也保持在这些区间内，即归一化在层间是传递的。在这些区间内，如果迭代应用映射g，均值和方差都会收敛到一个不动点。

items.capEn: Figure 1: The left panel and the right panel show the training error (y-axis) for feed-forward neural networks (FNNs) with batch normalization (BatchNorm) and self-normalizing networks (SNN) across update steps (x-axis) on the MNIST dataset the CIFAR10 dataset, respectively. We tested networks with 8, 16, and 32 layers and learning rate 1e-5. FNNs with batch normalization exhibit high variance due to perturbations. In contrast, SNNs do not suffer from high variance as they are more robust to perturbations and learn faster.
items.capZh: 图1：左图和右图分别显示了在MNIST数据集和CIFAR10数据集上，具有批归一化（BatchNorm）的前馈神经网络（FNN）和自归一化网络（SNN）的训练误差（y轴）随更新步数（x轴）的变化。我们测试了具有8、16和32层且学习率为1e-5的网络。具有批归一化的FNN由于扰动而表现出高方差。相比之下，SNN没有高方差，因为它们对扰动更鲁棒且学习更快。

items.en: Therefore, SNNs keep normalization of activations when propagating them through layers of the network. The normalization effect is observed across layers of a network: in each layer the activations are getting closer to the fixed point. The normalization effect can also observed be for two fixed layers across learning steps: perturbations of lower layer activations or weights are damped in the higher layer by drawing the activations towards the fixed point. If for all y𝑦y in the higher layer, ω𝜔\omega and τ𝜏\tau of the corresponding weight vector are the same, then the fixed points are also the same. In this case we have a unique fixed point for all activations y𝑦y. Otherwise, in the more general case, ω𝜔\omega and τ𝜏\tau differ for different y𝑦y but the mean activations are drawn into [μmin,μmax]subscript𝜇subscript𝜇[\mu_{\min},\mu_{\max}] and the variances are drawn into [νmin,νmax]subscript𝜈subscript𝜈[\nu_{\min},\nu_{\max}].
items.zh: 因此，SNN在通过网络层传播激活时保持激活的归一化。归一化效果在网络的各层中都能观察到：在每一层中，激活都越来越接近不动点。对于两个固定层，归一化效果也可以在多个学习步骤中观察到：低层激活或权重的扰动在高层中被抑制，通过将激活拉向不动点。如果对于高层中的所有y，对应权重向量的ω和τ相同，那么不动点也相同。在这种情况下，所有激活y都有一个唯一的不动点。否则，在更一般的情况下，不同y的ω和τ不同，但均值激活被拉入[μ_min, μ_max]，方差被拉入[ν_min, ν_max]。

items.en: We aim at constructing self-normalizing neural networks by adjusting the properties of the function g𝑔g. Only two design choices are available for the function g𝑔g: (1) the activation function and (2) the initialization of the weights.
items.zh: 我们旨在通过调整函数g的性质来构建自归一化神经网络。函数g只有两个设计选择：（1）激活函数和（2）权重的初始化。

items.en: For the activation function, we propose “scaled exponential linear units” (SELUs) to render a FNN as self-normalizing. The SELU activation function is given by
items.zh: 对于激活函数，我们提出“缩放指数线性单元”（SELU）以使FNN成为自归一化的。SELU激活函数由下式给出。

items.en: SELUs allow to construct a mapping g𝑔g with properties that lead to SNNs. SNNs cannot be derived with (scaled) rectified linear units (ReLUs), sigmoid units, tanh\tanh units, and leaky ReLUs. The activation function is required to have (1) negative and positive values for controlling the mean, (2) saturation regions (derivatives approaching zero) to dampen the variance if it is too large in the lower layer, (3) a slope larger than one to increase the variance if it is too small in the lower layer, (4) a continuous curve. The latter ensures a fixed point, where variance damping is equalized by variance increasing. We met these properties of the activation function by multiplying the exponential linear unit (ELU) [7] with λ>1𝜆1\lambda>1 to ensure a slope larger than one for positive net inputs.
items.zh: SELU允许构建具有导致SNN性质的映射g。SNN不能通过（缩放）修正线性单元（ReLU）、sigmoid单元、tanh单元和泄漏ReLU推导出来。激活函数需要具有（1）负值和正值以控制均值，（2）饱和区域（导数接近零）以在低层方差过大时抑制方差，（3）大于1的斜率以在低层方差过小时增加方差，（4）连续曲线。后者确保了一个不动点，其中方差抑制与方差增加相平衡。我们通过将指数线性单元（ELU）[7]乘以λ>1来满足激活函数的这些性质，以确保正净输入时斜率大于1。

items.en: For the weight initialization, we propose ω=0𝜔0\omega=0 and τ=1𝜏1\tau=1 for all units in the higher layer. The next paragraphs will show the advantages of this initialization. Of course, during learning these assumptions on the weight vector will be violated. However, we can prove the self-normalizing property even for weight vectors that are not normalized, therefore, the self-normalizing property can be kept during learning and weight changes.

We provide a proof sketch (see detailed proof in Appendix Section A3). With the Banach fixed point theorem we show that there exists a unique attracting and stable fixed point. To this end, we have to prove that a) g𝑔g is a contraction mapping and b) that the mapping stays in the domain, that is, g​(Ω)⊆Ω𝑔ΩΩg(\Omega)\subseteq\Omega. The spectral norm of the Jacobian of g𝑔g can be obtained via an explicit formula for the largest singular value for a 2×2222	imes 2 matrix. g𝑔g is a contraction mapping if its spectral norm is smaller than 111. We perform a computer-assisted proof to evaluate the largest singular value on a fine grid and ensure the precision of the computer evaluation by an error propagation analysis of the implemented algorithms on the according hardware. Singular values between grid points are upper bounded by the mean value theorem. To this end, we bound the derivatives of the formula for the largest singular value with respect to ω,τ,μ,ν𝜔𝜏𝜇𝜈\omega,	au,\mu,

items.zh: 我们提供一个证明概要（详细证明见附录A3节）。利用Banach不动点定理，我们证明存在一个唯一的吸引稳定不动点。为此，我们需要证明：a) g是一个压缩映射，b) 映射保持在定义域内，即g(Ω)⊆Ω。g的雅可比矩阵的谱范数可以通过2×2矩阵最大奇异值的显式公式获得。如果谱范数小于1，则g是压缩映射。我们进行计算机辅助证明，在精细网格上评估最大奇异值，并通过所实现算法在相应硬件上的误差传播分析来确保计算机评估的精度。网格点之间的奇异值通过均值定理给出上界。为此，我们限制了最大奇异值公式关于ω,τ,μ,ν的导数。然后，我们将均值定理应用于点对，其中一个点在网格上，另一个点不在网格上。这表明，对于定义域Ω内所有ω,τ,μ,ν的值，g的谱范数都小于1。因此，g在定义域Ω上是压缩映射。最后，我们通过推导μ̃和ν̃的界限，证明映射g保持在定义域Ω内。因此，Banach不动点定理成立，并且在Ω中存在一个唯一的不动点。∎

items.en: Consequently, feed-forward neural networks with many units in each layer and with the SELU activation function are self-normalizing (see definition 1), which readily follows from Theorem 1. To give an intuition, the main property of SELUs is that they damp the variance for negative net inputs and increase the variance for positive net inputs. The variance damping is stronger if net inputs are further away from zero while the variance increase is stronger if net inputs are close to zero. Thus, for large variance of the activations in the lower layer the damping effect is dominant and the variance decreases in the higher layer. Vice versa, for small variance the variance increase is dominant and the variance increases in the higher layer.
items.zh: 因此，每层具有大量单元且使用SELU激活函数的前馈神经网络是自归一化的（见定义1），这直接由定理1得出。直观上，SELU的主要特性是：对于负净输入，它抑制方差；对于正净输入，它增加方差。当净输入远离零时，方差抑制更强；而当净输入接近零时，方差增加更强。因此，对于下层激活的大方差，抑制效应占主导，上层方差减小。反之，对于小方差，方差增加占主导，上层方差增大。

u because this variable has much stronger influence than μ𝜇\mu. Mapping ν𝜈
u across layers to a high value corresponds to an exploding gradient, since the Jacobian of the activation of high layers with respect to activations in lower layers has large singular values. Analogously, mapping ν𝜈

Empirically, we found that dropout rates 1−q=0.051𝑞0.051-q=0.05 or 0.100.100.10 lead to models with good performance. “Alpha-dropout” fits well to scaled exponential linear units by randomly setting activations to the negative saturation value.
items.zh: 标准dropout以概率1-q将激活x随机置为零，其中0<q≤1。为了保持均值，训练期间激活按1/q缩放。如果x的均值为E(x)=μ，方差为Var(x)=ν，且dropout变量d服从二项分布B(1,q)，则均值E((1/q)dx)=μ保持不变。Dropout非常适合修正线性单元，因为零处于低方差区域，并且是默认值。对于缩放指数线性单元，默认和低方差值为lim_{x→-∞} selu(x) = -λα = α'。因此，我们提出“alpha dropout”，将输入随机设置为α'。新的均值和方差为E(xd+α'(1-d))=qμ+(1-q)α'，Var(xd+α'(1-d))=q((1-q)(α'-μ)^2+ν)。我们的目标是在“alpha dropout”后保持均值和方差不变，以确保即使使用“alpha dropout”也能保持自归一化性质。仿射变换a(xd+α'(1-d))+b允许确定参数a和b，使得均值和方差保持不变：E(a(xd+α'(1-d))+b)=μ且Var(a(xd+α'(1-d))+b)=ν。与dropout不同，a和b将依赖于μ和ν，但我们的SNN收敛到零均值和单位方差的激活。当μ=0且ν=1时，我们得到a=(q+α'^2 q(1-q))^{-1/2}，b=-(q+α'^2 q(1-q))^{-1/2}((1-q)α')。参数a和b仅依赖于dropout率1-q和最大负激活α'。实验发现，dropout率1-q=0.05或0.10的模型性能良好。“Alpha-dropout”通过将激活随机设置为负饱和值，很好地适应了缩放指数线性单元。

items.en: In the derivative of the mapping (Eq. (3)), we used the central limit theorem (CLT) to approximate the network inputs z=∑i=1nwi​xi𝑧superscriptsubscript𝑖1𝑛subscript𝑤𝑖subscript𝑥𝑖z=\sum_{i=1}^{n}w_{i}x_{i} with a normal distribution. We justified normality because network inputs represent a weighted sum of the inputs xisubscript𝑥𝑖x_{i}, where for Deep Learning n𝑛n is typically large. The Berry-Esseen theorem states that the convergence rate to normality is n−1/2superscript𝑛12n^{-1/2} [22]. In the classical version of the CLT, the random variables have to be independent and identically distributed, which typically does not hold for neural networks. However, the Lyapunov CLT does not require the variable to be identically distributed anymore. Furthermore, even under weak dependence, sums of random variables converge in distribution to a Gaussian distribution [5].
items.zh: 在映射（式(3)）的导数中，我们使用中心极限定理（CLT）将网络输入z=∑_{i=1}^n w_i x_i近似为正态分布。我们证明正态性是合理的，因为网络输入表示输入x_i的加权和，而在深度学习中n通常很大。Berry-Esseen定理指出，收敛到正态的速率为n^{-1/2}[22]。在经典CLT版本中，随机变量必须独立同分布，这通常不适用于神经网络。然而，Lyapunov CLT不再要求变量同分布。此外，即使在弱依赖下，随机变量之和也依分布收敛到高斯分布[5]。

items.en: We compare SNNs to other deep networks at different benchmarks. Hyperparameters such as number of layers (blocks), neurons per layer, learning rate, and dropout rate, are adjusted by grid-search for each dataset on a separate validation set (see Section A4). We compare the following FNN methods:
items.zh: 我们将SNN与其他深度网络在不同基准上进行比较。超参数如层数（块数）、每层神经元数、学习率和dropout率，通过网格搜索在每个数据集的单独验证集上调整（见A4节）。我们比较以下FNN方法：

items.en: “MSRAinit”: FNNs without normalization and with ReLU activations and “Microsoft weight initialization” [17].
items.zh: “MSRAinit”：无归一化、使用ReLU激活和“Microsoft权重初始化”[17]的FNN。

items.en: “BatchNorm”: FNNs with batch normalization [20].
items.zh: “BatchNorm”：使用批归一化[20]的FNN。

items.en: “LayerNorm”: FNNs with layer normalization [2].
items.zh: “LayerNorm”：使用层归一化[2]的FNN。

items.en: “WeightNorm”: FNNs with weight normalization [32].
items.zh: “WeightNorm”：使用权重归一化[32]的FNN。

items.en: “ResNet”: Residual networks [16] adapted to FNNs using residual blocks with 2 or 3 layers with rectangular or diavolo shape.
items.zh: “ResNet”：残差网络[16]适应于FNN，使用2层或3层的残差块，形状为矩形或diavolo。

items.en: “SNNs”: Self normalizing networks with SELUs with α=α01𝛼subscript𝛼01\alpha=\alpha_{\mathrm{01}} and λ=λ01𝜆subscript𝜆01\lambda=\lambda_{\mathrm{01}} and the proposed dropout technique and initialization strategy.
items.zh: “SNNs”：使用α=α₀₁和λ=λ₀₁的SELU的自归一化网络，以及提出的丢弃技术和初始化策略。

items.en: The benchmark comprises 121 classification datasets from the UCI Machine Learning repository [10] from diverse application areas, such as physics, geology, or biology. The size of the datasets ranges between 101010 and 130,000130000130,000 data points and the number of features from 444 to 250250250. In abovementioned work [10], there were methodological mistakes [37] which we avoided here. Each compared FNN method was optimized with respect to its architecture and hyperparameters on a validation set that was then removed from the subsequent analysis. The selected hyperparameters served to evaluate the methods in terms of accuracy on the pre-defined test sets (details on the hyperparameter selection are given in Section A4). The accuracies are reported in the Table A11. We ranked the methods by their accuracy for each prediction task and compared their average ranks. SNNs significantly outperform all competing networks in pairwise comparisons (paired Wilcoxon test across datasets) as reported in Table 1 (left panel).
items.zh: 该基准测试包含来自UCI机器学习库[10]的121个分类数据集，涵盖物理、地质或生物等不同应用领域。数据集大小从10到130,000个数据点不等，特征数量从4到250。在上述工作[10]中，存在方法论错误[37]，我们在此避免了这些错误。每个被比较的前馈神经网络（FNN）方法都在验证集上对其架构和超参数进行了优化，该验证集随后从后续分析中移除。选定的超参数用于在预定义测试集上评估方法的准确性（超参数选择的详细信息见附录A4）。准确性报告在表A11中。我们根据每个预测任务的准确性对方法进行排名，并比较它们的平均排名。SNN在成对比较中显著优于所有竞争网络（跨数据集的配对Wilcoxon检验），如表1（左面板）所示。

items.en: We further included 17 machine learning methods representing diverse method groups [10] in the comparison and the grouped the data sets into “small” and “large” data sets (for details see Section A4). On 75 small datasets with less than 1000 data points, random forests and SVMs outperform SNNs and other FNNs. On 46 larger datasets with at least 1000 data points, SNNs show the highest performance followed by SVMs and random forests (see right panel of Table 1, for complete results see Tables A12 and A12). Overall, SNNs have outperformed state of the art machine learning methods on UCI datasets with more than 1,000 data points.
items.zh: 我们进一步在比较中包含了代表不同方法组的17种机器学习方法[10]，并将数据集分为“小”和“大”数据集（详见附录A4）。在75个小于1000个数据点的小数据集上，随机森林和支持向量机（SVM）优于SNN和其他前馈神经网络（FNN）。在46个至少包含1000个数据点的较大数据集上，SNN表现出最高性能，其次是SVM和随机森林（见表1右面板，完整结果见表A12和A12）。总体而言，SNN在超过1000个数据点的UCI数据集上优于最先进的机器学习方法。

items.en: Typically, hyperparameter selection chose SNN architectures that were much deeper than the selected architectures of other FNNs, with an average depth of 10.8 layers, compared to average depths of 6.0 for BatchNorm, 3.8 WeightNorm, 7.0 LayerNorm, 5.9 Highway, and 7.1 for MSRAinit networks. For ResNet, the average number of blocks was 6.35. SNNs with many more than 4 layers often provide the best predictive accuracies across all neural networks.
items.zh: 通常，超参数选择倾向于选择比其它FNN架构深得多的SNN架构，平均深度为10.8层，而BatchNorm的平均深度为6.0，WeightNorm为3.8，LayerNorm为7.0，Highway为5.9，MSRAinit网络为7.1。对于ResNet，平均块数为6.35。具有超过4层的SNN通常在所有神经网络中提供最佳的预测准确性。

items.en: The Tox21 challenge dataset comprises about 12,000 chemical compounds whose twelve toxic effects have to be predicted based on their chemical structure. We used the validation sets of the challenge winners for hyperparameter selection (see Section A4) and the challenge test set for performance comparison. We repeated the whole evaluation procedure 5 times to obtain error bars. The results in terms of average AUC are given in Table 2. In 2015, the challenge organized by the US NIH was won by an ensemble of shallow ReLU FNNs which achieved an AUC of 0.846 [28]. Besides FNNs, this ensemble also contained random forests and SVMs. Single SNNs came close with an AUC of 0.845±plus-or-minus\pm0.003. The best performing SNNs have 8 layers, compared to the runner-ups ReLU networks with layer normalization with 2 and 3 layers. Also batchnorm and weightnorm networks, typically perform best with shallow networks of 2 to 4 layers (Table 2). The deeper the networks, the larger the difference in performance between SNNs and other methods (see columns 5–8 of Table 2). The best performing method is an SNN with 8 layers.
items.zh: Tox21挑战数据集包含约12,000种化学化合物，需要根据其化学结构预测其十二种毒性效应。我们使用挑战获胜者的验证集进行超参数选择（见附录A4），并使用挑战测试集进行性能比较。我们重复整个评估过程5次以获得误差棒。平均AUC的结果见表2。2015年，由美国国立卫生研究院组织的挑战赛由浅层ReLU FNN集成赢得，其AUC为0.846 [28]。该集成除了FNN外，还包含随机森林和SVM。单个SNN的AUC为0.845±0.003，接近该值。表现最佳的SNN有8层，而亚军是具有2层和3层的层归一化ReLU网络。同样，批归一化和权重归一化网络通常在2到4层的浅层网络中表现最佳（表2）。网络越深，SNN与其他方法之间的性能差异越大（见表2的第5-8列）。表现最佳的方法是具有8层的SNN。

items.en: Since a decade, machine learning methods have been used to identify pulsars in radio wave signals [27]. Recently, the High Time Resolution Universe Survey (HTRU2) dataset has been released with 1,639 real pulsars and 16,259 spurious signals. Currently, the highest AUC value of a 10-fold cross-validation is 0.976 which has been achieved by Naive Bayes classifiers followed by decision tree C4.5 with 0.949 and SVMs with 0.929. We used eight features constructed by the PulsarFeatureLab as used previously [27]. We assessed the performance of FNNs using 10-fold nested cross-validation, where the hyperparameters were selected in the inner loop on a validation set (for details on the hyperparameter selection see Section A4). Table 3 reports the results in terms of AUC. SNNs outperform all other methods and have pushed the state-of-the-art to an AUC of 0.980.980.98.
items.zh: 十年来，机器学习方法已被用于识别无线电波信号中的脉冲星[27]。最近，高时间分辨率宇宙巡天（HTRU2）数据集发布，包含1,639颗真实脉冲星和16,259个虚假信号。目前，10折交叉验证的最高AUC值为0.976，由朴素贝叶斯分类器实现，其次是决策树C4.5（0.949）和SVM（0.929）。我们使用了之前使用的PulsarFeatureLab构建的八个特征[27]。我们使用10折嵌套交叉验证评估FNN的性能，其中超参数在内部循环的验证集上选择（超参数选择的详细信息见附录A4）。表3以AUC形式报告了结果。SNN优于所有其他方法，并将最先进水平提升至AUC 0.98。

items.en: We have introduced self-normalizing neural networks for which we have proved that neuron activations are pushed towards zero mean and unit variance when propagated through the network. Additionally, for activations not close to unit variance, we have proved an upper and lower bound on the variance mapping. Consequently, SNNs do not face vanishing and exploding gradient problems. Therefore, SNNs work well for architectures with many layers, allowed us to introduce a novel regularization scheme, and learn very robustly. On 121 UCI benchmark datasets, SNNs have outperformed other FNNs with and without normalization techniques, such as batch, layer, and weight normalization, or specialized architectures, such as Highway or Residual networks. SNNs also yielded the best results on drug discovery and astronomy tasks. The best performing SNN architectures are typically very deep in contrast to other FNNs.
items.zh: 我们引入了自归一化神经网络，并证明了当神经元激活通过网络传播时，它们被推向零均值和单位方差。此外，对于不接近单位方差的激活，我们证明了方差映射的上界和下界。因此，SNN不会面临梯度消失和爆炸问题。因此，SNN适用于具有许多层的架构，使我们能够引入一种新颖的正则化方案，并且学习非常稳健。在121个UCI基准数据集上，SNN优于其他有或没有归一化技术（如批归一化、层归一化和权重归一化）的FNN，以及专用架构（如Highway或残差网络）。SNN在药物发现和天文学任务上也取得了最佳结果。表现最佳的SNN架构通常非常深，与其他FNN形成对比。
